ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the forum */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "boat_model" TEXT /* Boat model of the user */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_starter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the topic */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the topic */,
  "topic_type" TEXT /* Type of the topic (e.g., normal, sticky, hot) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the topic */,
  "sticky" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the topic is sticky */,
  "hot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the topic is hot */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the topic belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_topic_starter_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_starter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the reply is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was created */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last edited */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the reply has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the reply has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the topic */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_categories_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_categories_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES topic_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_categories_mapping_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new_post, reply, update) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the report */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being reported */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being reported */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the moderation action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., delete_topic, approve_post) */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., topic, reply) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being moderated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, post, reply) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
